candidateFindings.shortQuote: We do not accept international students for clinical experiences

candidateFindings.shortQuote: Visiting medical students pay $300 per elective. malpractice ($1 million per occurrence/ $3 million aggregate)

candidateFindings.pageTitle: Visiting Students Application Process and Fees
candidateFindings.shortQuote: Visiting students may take up to 8 weeks of electives at UC Davis School of Medicine.

negativeEvidence.strongNegativeEvidence: UC Davis SOM hub explicitly states 'We do not accept international students for clinical experiences.' International medical schools have no public lane.
negativeEvidence.weakNegativeEvidence: Visa language absent. UC Davis Medical Center hospital not separately named as placement site (implicit through SOM).

nextAction: For public-safe activation: (a) SCHOOL_LEVEL_SOURCE — UC Davis SOM hub; (b) MS4 only; (c) international students EXPLICITLY EXCLUDED for clinical experiences (verbatim); (d) $300 fee per elective; (e) max 8 weeks; (f) malpractice $1M/$3M required; (g) USMLE Step 1 or COMLEX passing required; (h) VSLO required.
plainEnglishSummary: UC Davis School of Medicine accepts only fourth-year US medical students for visiting electives via VSLO. International students are explicitly excluded for clinical experiences. Fee is $300 per elective, max 8 weeks, malpractice $1M/$3M required, USMLE Step 1 or COMLEX passing required. UC Davis Medical Center is the implicit placement site through the SOM.
driftCheck: This advanced national USCE discovery because California gained a fourth classified institution with verbatim audience exclusion + cost + duration + malpractice + USMLE-pass requirements captured.
